tasks.title: Add failing deterministic regression coverage for first-call adv_status bootstrap race against scoped ADV instruction loading.
tasks.verification: Added deterministic regression coverage for first-call adv_status bootstrap race: status now recovers when the first two status loads hit TMPRL1100/bootstrap fallback errors and only degrades after three repeated bootstrap failures. Focused status tests pass after retry expansion implementation.
tasks.summary: Added deterministic regression coverage for first-call adv_status bootstrap race: status now recovers when the first two status loads hit TMPRL1100/bootstrap fallback errors and only degrades after three repeated bootstrap failures. Focused status tests pass after retry expansion implementation.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added deterministic regression coverage for first-call adv_status bootstrap race: status now recovers when the first two status loads hit TMPRL1100/bootstrap fallback errors and only degrades after three repeated bootstrap failures. Focused status tests pass after retry expansion implementation.

tasks.title: Implement deterministic readiness ordering/retry/fallback for first-call status bootstrap.
tasks.verification: Implemented deterministic bounded bootstrap retry: adv_status now attempts status load up to three times with fixed 50ms backoff for Temporal fallback/bootstrap errors, reports recovered diagnostics when a retry succeeds, and only returns structural bootstrap-in-progress fallback after all attempts fail. Non-bootstrap errors still propagate.
tasks.summary: Implemented deterministic bounded bootstrap retry: adv_status now attempts status load up to three times with fixed 50ms backoff for Temporal fallback/bootstrap errors, reports recovered diagnostics when a retry succeeds, and only returns structural bootstrap-in-progress fallback after all attempts fail. Non-bootstrap errors still propagate.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented deterministic bounded bootstrap retry: adv_status now attempts status load up to three times with fixed 50ms backoff for Temporal fallback/bootstrap errors, reports recovered diagnostics when a retry succeeds, and only returns structural bootstrap-in-progress fallback after all attempts fail. Non-bootstrap errors still propagate.

tasks.title: Run focused status/bootstrap tests and plugin check; document verification evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm test --run src/tools/status.test.ts exited 0; pnpm run check exited 0.

wisdom.content: For first-call adv_status bootstrap races, bounded multi-attempt retry (3 attempts, fixed short backoff) is safer than single retry: recover transient TMPRL1100/bootstrap errors, but still return structured bootstrap-in-progress fallback after repeated failures.

proposal.approval_evidence: Batch accepted by user in OpenCode chat; structured GH response posted.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed autonomously from issue #56, proposal, and current healthy status. This is startup/bootstrap determinism bug; no HITL tradeoff/conflict detected.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan uses deterministic readiness/timing regression and targeted bootstrap ordering/retry/fallback while preserving scoped ADV instruction loading.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #56.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. Added bounded 3-attempt adv_status bootstrap retry for Temporal fallback/TMPRL1100 errors with fixed 50ms backoff; returns recovered diagnostics when later attempt succeeds and structural bootstrap-in-progress fallback only after repeated failures. Added deterministic regression for recovery after first two status loads fail. Verification: pnpm test --run src/tools/status.test.ts passed; pnpm run check passed. Checkpoint commit 25eb39f5c75408a6c93ab231b27145aaffe9676b. Live OpenCode session may require plugin reload/rebuild for live tool behavior.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

release.approval_evidence: Batch release approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes
